meta.name: Demo E-commerce Seed Data
meta.description: 50 products and 100 customers for database seed/demo usage.
meta.imageNote: Product images use Picsum placeholder image URLs. Customer avatars use DiceBear generated avatar URLs. Replace with your own assets before production if needed.
